options.name: -allow_illegal_macro
options.description: Allow the tool to continue even when macros are not legally placed. Default value: false

options.name: -enable_cpg
options.description: Enable CPG for a design which already has a floorplan with macro locations.

options.name: -post_reshape_tcl
options.description: Allow tool to load user specified floorplan objects after reshape floorplan. Such as track. It must be used with option -reshape at the same time.

options.name: -reshape
options.description: Allow tool to enlarge floorplan in order to fit all instances.
